summary: Comprehensive testing of BM Hospitality Content Manager feature (Iteration 5). All 17 backend API tests passed 100%. Frontend Admin Content Manager verified: 5 section tabs, CRUD operations (add/edit/delete), section-specific form fields. Public website integration verified: custom content appears on live site, default mock data shows when no custom content exists.

issues: Newsletter popup appears automatically and blocks user interactions - consider adding close button with X icon that's more visible, or adding a delay before showing

critical_code_review_comments: Content Manager CRUD operations working correctly with proper soft delete implementation
Public API /api/content/{section} correctly returns active content items
useContent hook properly falls back to mock data when DB is empty
Form fields dynamically change based on selected section (packages vs testimonials vs offers)
Data persistence verified: Create -> GET -> Update -> GET -> Delete -> Verify removal

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Content Manager UI features verified working)

seed_data_creation: Test content items were created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content Manager feature fully tested and working. Admin panel has 5 tabs: Dashboard, Image Manager, Content Manager, Inquiries, Subscriptions. Content Manager has 5 section tabs: Domestic Packages, International Packages, Goa Hotels/Resorts, Testimonials, Offers & Deals. Each section has different form fields. Frontend components (Packages.jsx, Testimonials.jsx, OffersDeals.jsx) use useContent hook with fallback to mock data.

features_verified.backend_admin_content_auth_required: PASS - Admin endpoints return 401 without auth
features_verified.backend_crud_persistence: PASS - Full CRUD cycle verified with GET after each operation
features_verified.frontend_admin_content_manager_nav: PASS - Content Manager nav item in admin sidebar
features_verified.frontend_admin_5_section_tabs: PASS - All 5 tabs present (Domestic, International, Goa, Testimonials, Offers)
features_verified.frontend_admin_add_button: PASS - Add button opens form dialog
features_verified.frontend_admin_form_fields_packages: PASS - Package form has name, destination, duration, description, highlights, image fields
features_verified.frontend_admin_form_fields_testimonials: PASS - Testimonial form has name, location, rating, comment, package, image fields
features_verified.frontend_admin_form_fields_offers: PASS - Offers form has title, description, discount, validTill, category, image fields
features_verified.frontend_admin_add_content: PASS - Adding content shows success toast and updates list
features_verified.frontend_admin_edit_content: PASS - Editing content shows success toast and persists changes
features_verified.frontend_admin_delete_content: PASS - Deleting content shows success toast and removes from list
features_verified.frontend_public_packages_shows_custom: PASS - Custom content added via admin appears on public packages section
features_verified.frontend_public_packages_fallback: PASS - Default mock data shows when no custom content exists
features_verified.frontend_public_testimonials_fallback: PASS - Default testimonials show when no custom testimonials exist
features_verified.frontend_public_offers_fallback: PASS - Default offers show when no custom offers exist
